Container.Name: sw-downloader
Container.Overview: Automatically downloads the latest Stan Wyjatkowy Saturday stream from YouTube before the channel edits the VOD. Uses Playwright to detect the stream and yt-dlp to download it once finished.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Where downloaded video files are saved.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Stores the state file (tracks what has been downloaded).

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone used for all cron schedules. See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones

Config.Name: Output Directory
Config.Description: Must match the container path set for Downloads above.

Config.Name: State File
Config.Description: Must be inside the container path set for Config above.

Config.Name: Max Age (hours)
Config.Description: How many hours after upload a video is still considered the unedited stream.

Config.Name: Min Duration (minutes)
Config.Description: Minimum video length in minutes. Shorter videos are assumed to be already edited.

Config.Name: Show Year
Config.Description: Show premiere year included in the output filename.

Config.Name: Find Cron
Config.Description: Cron expression for when to check if a new stream is available. Default: Saturday 20:05.

Config.Name: Download Cron
Config.Description: Cron expression for how often to attempt the download. Default: every 30 minutes.

Config.Name: Run Now
Config.Description: Set to true to trigger the find+download pipeline immediately instead of waiting for cron. Set back to false after testing.
